self_conditional_modifiers_json.description: Isshin Art Clarity: Normal/Charged/Plunging Attack hits trigger a Hewing Gale (CD 8s) dealing AoE DMG equal to 180% of ATK; approximated as bonus Normal/Charged/Plunging Attack DMG. Amber's API only exposes a single unscaled tier for this affix (no per-refinement breakdown), so this value is used directly as the R5 approximation.
